scripts.pages:build: opennextjs-cloudflare build && cp -r .open-next/cloudflare .open-next/assets/cloudflare && cp -r .open-next/middleware .open-next/assets/middleware && cp -r .open-next/server-functions .open-next/assets/server-functions && cp -r .open-next/.build .open-next/assets/.build && cp .open-next/worker.js .open-next/assets/_worker.js
